ground_truth.title: Data Analytics Certification & Training Online | SSGI
ground_truth.main_content: SSGI's Data Analytics Certification equips professionals with advanced analytical skills to drive organizational success. The program, led by Dr. Barry Shore, covers descriptive analytics, data visualization with Tableau, sampling, hypothesis testing, A/B testing, data mining, big data, SQL introduction, and analysis using R. Training is 100% online, self-paced, and mobile-friendly with lifetime access. According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics, data analytics roles are expected to grow 30 percent over the next seven years. The program includes real-world case studies, practice exams, and digital flashcards. Upon passing the 100-question exam with a 75% passing score, participants receive a globally recognized certification and digital badge shareable on LinkedIn. The course is designed for business analysts, marketers, management professionals, and students looking to advance their careers. SSGI is a PMI Accredited ATP, SHRM Approved Provider, Baldridge Foundation Partner, and Inc 5000 Award Winning Company. Training is trusted by Fortune 500 companies including Disney, Tesla, Amazon, and Deloitte. Enrollment fee is $199 with payment plans available from $17.96/month. Average completion time is 1-3 weeks with no time restrictions.
with: SSGI's Data Analytics Certification equips you with the tools to leverage advanced analytical techniques and drive meaningful improvements in your organization.
According to the Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS), the number of roles for individuals with skills in Data Analytics is expected to grow by 30 percent over the next seven years.
At SSGI, your training is led by Dr. Barry Shore, an award-winning professor with 40+ years of real-world experience.
SSGI is a PMI Accredited ATP, SHRM Approved Provider, Baldrige Foundation Partner and an Inc 5000 Award Winning Company.
The program includes real-world case studies, practice exams, and digital flashcards with lifetime access and no additional fees.
without: Follow us on Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter, YouTube
